title: Trader Arrives
description: A rover convoy exchanged parts for telemetry.

title: Hydroponics Fungus
description: A fungal bloom damaged lettuce trays.

title: Coffee Outage
description: The colony discovered the last filter was used yesterday.

title: Parts Cache
description: A buried crate contained useful components.

title: Sick Colonist
description: A fever spread through the bunks.

title: Dust Seal Failure
description: Fine regolith infiltrated the greenhouse seals.

title: Array Burnout
description: A voltage spike scorched the primary collector. Daily output halved until repaired.

title: Systems Fault
description: An untraced fault took down a key facility. Output halved until the crew gets to it.
